headline: Morgan Stanley drops timely Honeywell stock opinion

headline: Power Struggle: Wolfspeed Sues Navitas Over AI Chips
summary: Wolfspeed sued Navitas Semiconductor over five wide-bandgap patents, seeking an import injunction and damages, as both companies face debt, cash burn and shifting AI datacenter supply chains.
